_comment: IMB-08 diagonal uses ask[P] vs bid[P - tickSize] (one tick DOWN, NOT bid[P + tickSize]). This is the CRITICAL directional regression guard.
description: Diagonal buy imbalance. Two adjacent levels: 20000.00 and 20000.25 (one tickSize=0.25 apart). ask[20000.25]=400 vs bid[20000.00]=80, ratio=5.0 > 3.0. IMB-08 fires with direction=+1.

bar.notes: Diagonal buy imbalance: ask[20000.25]=400 vs bid[20000.00]=80 (P - tickSize). Ratio=5.0 > 3.0. Direction=+1 (buy imbalance). IMB-08 should emit detail containing 'P-tick diag'.
